metadata.title: Collapsible Code Blocks
metadata.description: Makes code blocks collapsible in reader view and edit view as well as enabling scroll-able code blocks.

regex.source: .setDesc("Should code blocks be collapsed by default?")
.setDesc("Icon to show when code block is expanded (single character or emoji only)")
regex.target: .setDesc("代码块展开时显示的图标（仅限单个字符或表情符号）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Icon to show when code block is collapsed (single character or emoji only)")
regex.target: .setDesc("代码块折叠时显示的图标（仅限单个字符或表情符号）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Allow code blocks to scroll horizontally instead of wrapping text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("允许代码块水平滚动而不是换行.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Number of lines visible when code block is collapsed")
